name: 婆媳同盟（善良婆婆）
description: Biddy是少數站在Michelle這邊的豪門成員，她的善意在壓迫環境中顯得格外珍貴，也展現了豪門內部並非鐵板一塊。

examples.drama_title: Reel Revenge: Divorced Director Strikes Back | Watch the full episode on the ShortMax app
examples.excerpt: Of course not, sweetheart. I know you could never hurt anyone. ... I shouldn't have forced him to marry you. But with the family business slacking, we needed Richard to have a family. ... I know Richard seems indifferent, but I know my son and he really does care about you.
examples.context: Biddy是少數站在Michelle這邊的豪門成員，她的善意在壓迫環境中顯得格外珍貴，也展現了豪門內部並非鐵板一塊。
